Acne Studios Spray-Painted Distressed Logo Short-Sleeve T-Shirt.  
Made from custom cloud-soft, smooth, ski-feel cotton—drapey, smooth, delicate, and breathable.  
Marble-white wash offers a relaxed, warm minimalistic wrinkle effect.  
Features Acne Studios 1996 logo on the chest with uneven brushstroke shading, resembling time-worn marks.  
Spray-painted distressing adds imperfect charm, creating a soft-meets-strong visual contrast.  
Design speaks for itself, making the garment an extension of the wearer’s personality.  

Uses plastisol printing: chest print refined through three film screen adjustments.  
Plastisol liquid ink printed on fabric, then heat-cured to fix the design.  
Gradient distressed spray technique applies varied dyes on fabric surface, producing rich color shifts under different lighting and enhancing visual depth.  
Multiple areas feature hand-placed, regular abrasion and brush strokes to mimic natural wear, adding texture and depth.  
Fabric is washed for superior hand feel, shape retention, shrink resistance, and colorfastness, ensuring lasting beauty.  

Sizes S-XL:  
S - Chest 112 cm, Shoulder 51.5 cm, Length 68 cm  
M - Chest 116 cm, Shoulder 53 cm, Length 70 cm  
L - Chest 120 cm, Shoulder 55.5 cm, Length 72 cm  
XL - Chest 124 cm, Shoulder 56 cm, Length 74 cm

ACNE Studios SS Fleece Zip Jacket SIZE S/M/L, complete tags, next-day shipping.

Custom Weaving: Unlike standard ready-made fabrics, we intervene from the yarn stage to develop a unique weaving plan for this jacket. The fabric uses high-count combed cotton yarn, with adjusted loom settings to create a denser, fuller, evenly textured, and tightly structured fleece. The precise weight (G) achieves a perfect balance—ensuring a structured yet draping silhouette without bulk or heat, ideal for spring-summer transition.

Custom Dyeing: The color is not ordinary dye. Based on ACNE’s signature low-saturation tones, multiple color calibrations and wash tests ensure accurate hues. Imported eco-friendly reactive dyes and special washing produce high colorfastness with a subtle vintage faded look, avoiding a harsh new appearance.

Zipper: Custom alloy teeth and pullers feature a special surface passivation for a uniform matte, naturally oxidized vintage effect. Each zipper is hand-inspected to ensure natural aged color without glare. The zipper glides smoothly with a solid, weighted feel, far superior to cheap lightweight zippers. The puller logo is etched and filled, clear and deep.

Embroidery: High-density base embroidery creates a full, three-dimensional pattern with a firm texture, never revealing the base fabric. The Tajima machine’s precision perfectly replicates ACNE’s fine logo edges, especially the sharp “A” and subtle “E” strokes, without omission.

Summary: This jacket is a meticulous pursuit of detail. Every step sets a high standard, distinctly different from mass-produced garments using off-the-shelf fabrics and accessories. It is a deep tribute to the brand’s aesthetics and a concentrated showcase of premium garment craftsmanship.

Acne Studios FW Lace Pearl Printed Denim Tote Bag is woven with high-density double yarns, weighing g/㎡, featuring a coarse twill texture. Pre-shrunk enzyme wash ensures dimensional stability, giving the bag a structured frame and deformation resistance. Imported digital direct injection printing uses color nano-ink layering technology to apply the "lace pants" pattern with micron-level precision between canvas yarns, creating a 3D embossed tactile effect. The printed fabric undergoes UV curing and silicone softening for wash and abrasion resistance. Brother BAS double-needle flat sewing machine with titanium-coated denim needles and Tex high-elastic polyester thread stitches parallel double lines on side seams and bottom, distributing load evenly. Three-dimensional backstitch reinforcement with computerized programming at handle anchors and stress points, combined with hot-melt adhesive backing, forms a mechanical-chemical dual fixation. This design merges material science and precision sewing, uniting delicate aesthetics with heavy-duty canvas functionality, reflecting ACNE’s pursuit of contemporary artisanal craftsmanship. - ACNE Studios Hollow Mohair Smile Sweater  
Made from a blend of mohair/wool/acrylic/nylon fibers. Mohair (for luster and loft) and wool (for warmth) are spun with low-twist rotor spinning to retain natural fiber texture. Acrylic (wrinkle resistance) and nylon (abrasion resistance) are core-spun inside to avoid overly smooth surface and preserve fabric hand feel.  

Knitted on a Japanese Shima Seiki G-type machine, programmed to skip needles (every stitch is a float) creating a hollow base. Fabric weight is controlled at - g/m² to balance breathability and drape.  

The smile pattern uses intarsia knitting with no floats on the back. Each color block is fed from separate yarn cones (number of cones = pattern width/needles) to prevent back yarn tension affecting skin comfort. High alignment precision is required; edges are fine-tuned at the needle level to avoid jagged outlines.  

The challenge lies in combining precise mechanical hollow jacquard knitting with hand embroidery details, where any error disrupts the signature minimalist aesthetic.  

Sizes: S, M, L
